title: COBOL / JCL / REXX / CICS / IMS Mainframe Pack
safety_boundary: Financial and transaction semantics must be proven by record-level and monetary parallel-run evidence before cutover.

title: SAP ABAP / ABAP Cloud / CDS / RAP Pack
safety_boundary: Generated changes must respect SAP released APIs, client/tenant boundaries, transport governance, and clean-core policy.

title: PL/SQL / T-SQL / PL/pgSQL / SQL PL Pack
safety_boundary: Logic must remain in the database when atomicity, data locality, or performance evidence requires it; extraction cannot be automatic dogma.

title: IEC 61131-3 PLC Languages Pack
safety_boundary: Safety PLC, SIL-rated logic, emergency shutdown, and physical actuation require independent qualified engineering approval and hardware validation.

title: MATLAB / Simulink / Stateflow Pack
safety_boundary: Safety-critical generated code is not certified by model tests alone; target compiler, hardware, and applicable lifecycle standards remain mandatory.

title: Modelica / FMI / FMU Digital Twin Pack
safety_boundary: Simulation predictions must be labelled separately from observed physical state and cannot directly authorize unsafe control actions.

title: VB6 / VBA / VB.NET / Office Automation Pack
safety_boundary: Macro modernization must preserve document and business outcomes while preventing unsigned or over-privileged automation.

title: IBM i RPG / CL / DDS / DB2 for i Pack
safety_boundary: Record formats, decimal semantics, commitment control, and operational job behavior require production-representative parallel validation.

title: R / Quarto / Shiny / renv Pack
safety_boundary: Statistical conclusions must disclose data coverage, assumptions, random seeds, packages, and uncertainty; generated analyses are not automatically scientifically valid.

title: SAS / Macro / PROC SQL / Viya Modernization Pack
safety_boundary: Migration claims require dataset-, statistic-, and report-level equivalence within explicitly approved tolerances.

title: Salesforce Apex / SOQL / LWC Pack
safety_boundary: CRUD, field-level security, sharing, tenant boundaries, and governor limits are mandatory correctness properties rather than optional optimizations.

title: Objective-C to Swift Modernization Pack
safety_boundary: Migration must preserve Objective-C runtime features, memory ownership, public APIs, and application-store/runtime constraints.

title: Delphi / Object Pascal Modernization Pack
safety_boundary: Industrial and hardware-connected Delphi systems require target-device and timing validation before replacement.

title: Erlang / Elixir / Gleam BEAM Pack
safety_boundary: Fault tolerance must be demonstrated under process crashes, node partitions, overload, and rolling release upgrades—not inferred from using OTP.

title: Lua / OpenResty / Embedded Scripting Pack
safety_boundary: Untrusted Lua and plugin execution must be capability-limited, resource-bounded, and isolated from secrets and host process authority.
